{{Infobox madra
| name = Stellar Spear madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Stellar Spear]] [[madra]] is a specialized form of energy used by [[sacred artists]] on the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]]. This [[madra]] is a combination of the light and [[sword]] aspects, often manifesting as brilliant white or silver-colored energy that resembles starlight. It is frequently utilized to reinforce weapons, such as through the [[Star]]’s Edge technique, or to create multiple spectral spear projections that can strike simultaneously. These manifestations are capable of delivering devastating physical and spiritual damage, often accompanied by powerful [[sword aura]] that can shred targets or disrupt enemy techniques. The [[madra]] is associated with the [[Jai clan]], a historically formidable faction from the [[Desolate Wilds]] that used these light-aspected combat techniques to unify the region. Additionally, [[Stellar Spear Remnants]] exist as bony, starlight-like entities that can be summoned or encountered.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Stellar Spear madra]] can be used to slice skin.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Stellar Spear madra]] produces white light.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Stellar Spear madra]] flared to [[life]] all over the city.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Stellar Spear madra]] is present in Serpent’s Grave.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Stellar Spear madra]] is a blend of the [[sword]] and light aspects.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Orthos]] suspected the leftover [[madra]] was [[Stellar Spear madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
